title: Plate Count Agar
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dk655","text":"Plate Count Agar (PCA), is a microbiological growth medium to assess viable bacterial growth of a sample.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a34si","text":"The total number of living aerobic bacteria can be determined using PCA which is a substrate for bacteria to grow on. The medium contains casein which provides nitrogen, carbon, amino acids, vitamins and minerals to aid in the growth of the organism. Yeast extract is the source for vitamins and glucose is the fermentable carbohydrate. Agar is the solidifying agent. This is a non-selective medium and the bacteria is counted as colony forming units per gram (CFU/g) in solid samples and (CFU/ml) in liquid samples.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":138,"length":6},{"style":"bold","offset":251,"length":13},{"style":"bold","offset":296,"length":7},{"style":"bold","offset":337,"length":4}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"bk8pv","text":"Prepare enough for the necessary number of experiments to perform in order to prevent batch-to-batch variation between experiments. Input chemicals should be of a certain quality in order to prevent contaminants that can impact microbial growth and selection.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"666ij","text":"Be sure to wear appropriate PPE when working with antibiotics and chemicals. Take care when working with hot flasks and tubes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: In a bottle, add approx. 400 mL deionized water

Measure and add: 5 g Tryptone 2.5 g Yeast extract 1 g Glucose 15 g Agar Materials: Tryptone Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore) Catalog #T9410 (CAS: 91079-40-2) Yeast Extract Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #Y0875 Glucose Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #G7021 Agar Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #A1296
Adjust pH to pH 7.0 using sodium hydroxide
Fill bottle to 500 mL total with deionized water
Aliquot liquid in 15 mL and 50 mL units and store refrigerated at 4 °C
creator: Andreas Sagen
